en: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Send men to spy out the land of Canaan, which I am giving to the people of Israel. From each tribe of their fathers you shall send a man, every one a chief among them."
zh: “你要派人窺探我賜給以色列人的迦南地；按著父家所屬的支派，每支派要派一個人，個個都必須是他們的領袖。”

en: So Moses sent them from the wilderness of Paran, according to the command of the LORD, all of them men who were heads of the people of Israel.
zh: 摩西就照著耶和華的吩咐，從巴蘭的曠野派他們去了；他們都是以色列人的領袖。

en: And these were their names: From the tribe of Reuben, Shammua the son of Zaccur;
zh: 以下是他們的名字：屬流本支派的是撒刻的兒子沙母亞。

en: from the tribe of Simeon, Shaphat the son of Hori;
zh: 屬西緬支派的是何利的兒子沙法。

en: from the tribe of Judah, Caleb the son of Jephunneh;
zh: 屬猶大支派的是耶孚尼的兒子迦勒。

en: from the tribe of Issachar, Igal the son of Joseph;
zh: 屬以薩迦支派的是約色的兒子以迦。

en: from the tribe of Ephraim, Hoshea the son of Nun;
zh: 屬以法蓮支派的是嫩的兒子何西亞。

en: from the tribe of Benjamin, Palti the son of Raphu;
zh: 屬便雅憫支派的是拉孚的兒子帕提。

en: from the tribe of Zebulun, Gaddiel the son of Sodi;
zh: 屬西布倫支派的是梭底的兒子迦疊。

en: from the tribe of Joseph (that is, from the tribe of Manasseh), Gaddi the son of Susi;
zh: 屬約瑟支派的，就是屬瑪拿西支派的，是蘇西的兒子迦底。

en: from the tribe of Dan, Ammiel the son of Gemalli;
zh: 屬但支派的是基瑪利的兒子亞米利。

en: from the tribe of Asher, Sethur the son of Michael;
zh: 屬亞設支派的是米迦勒的兒子西帖。

en: from the tribe of Naphtali, Nahbi the son of Vophsi;
zh: 屬拿弗他利支派的是瓦縛西的兒子拿比。

en: from the tribe of Gad, Geuel the son of Machi.
zh: 屬迦得支派的是瑪基的兒子臼利。

en: These were the names of the men whom Moses sent to spy out the land. And Moses called Hoshea the son of Nun Joshua.
zh: 以上是摩西派去窺探那地的人的名字。摩西稱嫩的兒子何西亞為約書亞。

en: Moses sent them to spy out the land of Canaan and said to them, "Go up into the Negeb and go up into the hill country,
zh: 摩西派他們去窺探迦南地，對他們說：“你們要從這裡上南地，然後上山地去。

en: and see what the land is, and whether the people who dwell in it are strong or weak, whether they are few or many,
zh: 看看那地怎樣，住在那裡的人是強是弱，是多是少；

en: and whether the land that they dwell in is good or bad, and whether the cities that they dwell in are camps or strongholds,
zh: 看看他們住的地怎樣，是好是壞；看看他們所住的城鎮怎樣，是營地，還是城堡；

en: and whether the land is rich or poor, and whether there are trees in it or not. Be of good courage and bring some of the fruit of the land." Now the time was the season of the first ripe grapes.
zh: 看看那地怎樣，是肥沃還是貧瘠，那裡有樹木沒有。你們要壯膽，把那地的果子帶些回來。”那時正是葡萄初熟的時候。

en: So they went up and spied out the land from the wilderness of Zin to Rehob, near Lebo-hamath.
zh: 他們上去窺探了那地，從尋的曠野到利合，直到哈瑪關口。

en: They went up into the Negeb and came to Hebron. Ahiman, Sheshai, and Talmai, the descendants of Anak, were there. (Hebron was built seven years before Zoan in Egypt.)
zh: 他們上到南地，到了希伯崙，在那裡有亞衲族人的後裔亞希幔、示篩、撻買。原來希伯崙城比埃及的瑣安城早建七年。

en: And they came to the Valley of Eshcol and cut down from there a branch with a single cluster of grapes, and they carried it on a pole between two of them; they also brought some pomegranates and figs.
zh: 他們來到以實各谷，從那裡砍下了一根葡萄枝子，上頭只有一掛葡萄，兩個人用槓抬著回來；他們也帶了些石榴和無花果回來。

en: That place was called the Valley of Eshcol, because of the cluster that the people of Israel cut down from there.
zh: 因為以色列人從那裡砍來的那掛葡萄，所以那地方叫作以實各谷。

en: At the end of forty days they returned from spying out the land.
zh: 四十天以後，他們窺探那地完畢，就回來。

en: And they came to Moses and Aaron and to all the congregation of the people of Israel in the wilderness of Paran, at Kadesh. They brought back word to them and to all the congregation, and showed them the fruit of the land.
zh: 他們來到了巴蘭曠野的加低斯，見摩西、亞倫和以色列的全體會眾，向摩西、亞倫及全體會眾報告，又把那地的果子給他們看。

en: And they told him, "We came to the land to which you sent us. It flows with milk and honey, and this is its fruit.
zh: 他們告訴摩西：“我們到了你派我們去的那地，果然是流奶與蜜的地，這就是那地的果子。

en: However, the people who dwell in the land are strong, and the cities are fortified and very large. And besides, we saw the descendants of Anak there.
zh: 只是住在那地的人強壯，城又堅固又十分高大，並且我們在那裡也看見了亞衲族人的後裔。

en: The Amalekites dwell in the land of the Negeb. The Hittites, the Jebusites, and the Amorites dwell in the hill country. And the Canaanites dwell by the sea, and along the Jordan."
zh: 有亞瑪力人住在南地；赫人、耶布斯人、亞摩利人住在山地；迦南人住在海邊和約旦河沿岸。”

en: But Caleb quieted the people before Moses and said, "Let us go up at once and occupy it, for we are well able to overcome it."
zh: 迦勒在摩西面前使眾人鎮靜，說：“我們立刻上去，佔領那地吧！因為我們必能得勝。”

en: Then the men who had gone up with him said, "We are not able to go up against the people, for they are stronger than we are."
zh: 但是，那些與他同去的人卻說：“我們不能上去攻擊那民，因為他們比我們強。”

en: So they brought to the people of Israel a bad report of the land that they had spied out, saying, "The land, through which we have gone to spy it out, is a land that devours its inhabitants, and all the people that we saw in it are of great height.
zh: 那些探子就他們窺探之地向以色列人報惡信，說：“我們經過要窺探的地方，是個吞吃居民的地方；我們在那裡看見的人，個個都高大。

en: And there we saw the Nephilim (the sons of Anak, who come from the Nephilim), and we seemed to ourselves like grasshoppers, and so we seemed to them."
zh: 在那裡我們看見了巨人，就是亞衲人的子孫，是巨人的後裔；我們看自己好像是蚱蜢，他們看我們也是這樣。”
